positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial flora design featuring intricate bioluminescent hummingbirds nesting within giant, stylized cosmic lily pads. The composition is perfectly centered, utilizing clean, thick silhouettes with ethereal glow accents. The color palette emphasizes deep indigo, brilliant gold leaf accents, and electric teal, providing maximum contrast for apparel printing. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau meets cosmic science fantasy, rendered with crisp vector lines and perfect symmetry. Wallpaper quality, print-ready, high contrast, seamless pattern potential.
negative: blurry, messy, low contrast, gradient, noise, artifact, text, watermark, border, logos, messy composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, amateur drawing, cartoon, photorealism, busy, grunge
